title: ruta graveolens var. bracteosa
intro: Ruta graveolens var. bracteosa, also known as Rue or Garden Rue, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ruta graveolens var. bracteosa include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms, and improving digestion. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, or applied topically to the skin in the form of creams or ointments.
